purpose: Single source for the 8-item ethics checklist. Read by centinela's ethics gate, by the PR template, and by docs/ETHICS.md. Editing any item here is the canonical change — update the markdown mirrors after, not before.

items.title: Intent declared
items.question: What behaviour change does this PR push the user toward, and whose benefit does it serve?

items.title: No deception, no coercion
items.question: Does any copy, default, or affordance mislead about consequences or remove a reasonable opt-out?

items.title: Asymmetric persistence justified
items.question: If the UI nags, retries, or auto-reopens, is the user clearly in control of stopping it?

items.title: Borrowed credibility honest
items.question: Do badges, charts, or 'AI-powered' labels imply more authority than the system actually has?

items.title: Emotional cues reciprocal or disclosed
items.question: Does the UI express feelings without a way for the user's emotion to alter the system?

items.title: Surveillance overt and supportive
items.question: Is any telemetry visible to the user at the moment of capture, and used for help, not punishment?

items.title: Vulnerable-group impact considered
items.question: Could a child, non-native reader, anxious / low-vision / motor-impaired user be harmed by this pattern?

items.title: Unintended-but-predictable outcomes named
items.question: What is the worst-case misuse or escalation of this behavior change, and is the design resilient to it?
